ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "song_artist" TEXT /* Artist of the song */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability metric of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy metric of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness metric of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness metric of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness metric of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness metric of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness metric of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence metric of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_song_artist FOREIGN KEY ("song_artist") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Time when the user last logged in */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* Preferred music genres of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song that was played */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time when the song was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played by the user */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song play in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the recommended song */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the recommendation was created */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the song */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song that was rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Time when the song was rated */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed the artist */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who was followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Time when the artist was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g. 'danceability', 'energy') */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the playlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist song */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Time when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES user_playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("id")
)
